opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't catch my breath when I lie down, and my legs feel so heavy and swollen I can barely lift them.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The breathlessness has got much worse over the last day or two and now I'm short of breath even sitting still, and my legs have swelled right up.

symptom_narrative.onset: a gradual decline over the past month, but much worse in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: weeks of slow worsening, then a sharp deterioration over the last two days
symptom_narrative.character: breathless and puffed out, with heavy, swollen legs and a feeling of not being able to get a full breath lying down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I'm exhausted and can barely move around the house now — I'm mostly stuck in my chair
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse when I lie flat and at night; a bit easier sitting upright
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up straight or sleeping in my recliner helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat, and walking even a short distance between rooms
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling very weak and tired all over; wake up at night gasping for air and have to sit up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a heart problem for a while and take tablets for it, but I've not been this bad before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm largely chair-bound now; my spouse is struggling to help me move around

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing heart problem that I take tablets for

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a fluid tablet (water tablet) that I've been prescribed

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who helps with day-to-day tasks; mobility is now very limited

objective_data_offered.value: about 88 kg this morning, up around 4 kg from my usual weight in the last week or so
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-weighed on home bathroom scales; single reading

objective_data_offered.value: spouse reports he is visibly breathless just talking and sitting upright in his chair, and can't lie flat to sleep
both legs are swollen up to about the knees and feel heavy; the swelling looks the same on both sides
